source_pr.title: topsql: fix data race in reporter test
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: mornyx <mornyx.z@gmail.com>

Issue Number: close #31439

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: topsql: fix data race in reporter test
failure_signature: topsql: fix data race in reporter test
root_cause_explanation: The flakiness was caused by a race between the reporter's background worker and the test assertion: the test was reading shared in-memory state (mock sink data) that could be written concurrently, leading to data races and intermittent failures. This PR stabilizes it by switching the mock sink to communicate via a channel and waiting with a bounded timeout before asserting on the reported data.
fix_pattern: Avoid unsynchronized shared state in async tests (use channels + bounded waits to observe background output safely).

evidence: evidence: topsql: fix data race in reporter test
